title: run-llama/llama_index
abstract: 🗂️ LlamaIndex 🦙 📚 Documentation: Building with LlamaIndex typically involves working with LlamaIndex core and a chosen set of integrations or plugins. There are two ways to start building with LlamaIn...
abstract_zh: 如果你在写周报时还在苦恼如何整理海量资料，或者在调Bug时翻箱倒柜找文档——试试 **llama_index** 吧！它就像一个私人知识库，帮你一键检索所有相关信息。相比那些老式工具，**llama_index** 响应速度更快，还能智能过滤无用信息，简直就是效率杀手啊！快来体验一下吧！🚀
